warnings: /home/erobles/.conda/envs/assay_env/bin/python: can't open file '/home/erobles/chem-skills/skills/orbitals/scripts/orbitals.py': [Errno 2] No such file or directory

prose: I attempted to run the `orbitals` skill with B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard) in the gas phase (charge 0, multiplicity 1) on benzene using the provided XYZ file, but the backend script for the skill was not found at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/skills/orbitals/scripts/orbitals.py`. No orbital energies could be computed due to this missing entry point.
